page_metadata.biotools__summary: GenoVault is a private cloud-based central repository for storage and retrieval of genomics data generated in various research labs in various organizations. The solution is delivered in the form of a software suite called “GenoVault”, that enables quick archival and retrieval of data along with analytical support.
